endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/autoscalesettings
endpoints.description: Lists the autoscale settings for a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/autoscalesettings
endpoints.description: Lists the autoscale settings for a resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/autoscalesettings/{autoscaleSettingName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{AUTOSCALESETTINGNAME}} with a real autoscalesettingname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/autoscalesettings/{autoscaleSettingName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates an autoscale setting.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{AUTOSCALESETTINGNAME}} with a real autoscalesettingname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/autoscalesettings/{autoscaleSettingName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{AUTOSCALESETTINGNAME}} with a real autoscalesettingname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/autoscalesettings/{autoscaleSettingName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing AutoscaleSettingsResource. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{AUTOSCALESETTINGNAME}} with a real autoscalesettingname.
